Among the Sages the revered Martci is situated in the east;
to his west is Vasistha, to his west is Afigiras; to his west is situated
Atri; and close to him is Pulastya. Next to him are in order Pulaha
and Kratu. Arundhall, the paragon of virtue, is close to the great
Sage Vasistha among them.
^g: ^ ^ f^rt: fFiTTOar MVSU
When these Sages (the Great Bear) are attacked by meteors,
thunderbolts, smoke and the like, or when they become pale, devoid
of rays or tiny, they will destroy severally their own dependencies
(as stated blow), whereas they help the same to prosper, if they
appear large and bright.
[Cf. —
